.canvas-node-content.background: rgba(244, 244, 244, 0.85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.canvas-node-content.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 3px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 0px 1px 1.5px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px

.file-embed.background: rgb(244, 244, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(244, 244, 244, 0.85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.internal-embed.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 3px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 0px 1px 1.5px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgba(244, 244, 244, 0.85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.internal-embed.is-loaded.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 3px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 0px 1px 1.5px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px

.markdown-embed.background: rgba(244, 244, 244, 0.85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.markdown-embed.box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 3px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) 0px 1px 1.5px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px

.status-bar.background: rgb(207, 207, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(244, 244, 244, 0.85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 100%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0, 0%, 100%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 100%) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 100%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(0, 0%, 100%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(0, 0%, 100%) 65%, transparent))

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(129, 80, 244, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(129, 80, 244, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(207, 207, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(207, 207, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(244, 244, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(80, 33, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(236, 236, 236) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(244, 244, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(199, 245, 92, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(244, 244, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(244, 244, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
